supporting_quote: Gapmers ... exhibiting significant in vitro inhibition of STAT3 were tested at various doses in HuVEC cells. ... RNA was isolated from the cells and STAT3 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human STAT3 primer probe set RTS199 ... was used to measure mRNA levels. STAT3 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of STAT3, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Isis/Ionis-style patent. The assigned HuVEC in-vitro screens (primer-probe RTS199) are normalized to total RNA by RiboGreen throughout. Exceptions are NOT in HuVEC: in-vivo mouse tumor xenograft studies measure murine STAT3 (mSTAT3_LTS00664) 'normalized to cyclophilin', and some in-vivo tissue data are 'adjusted according to content of beta-actin' -- neither applies to the HuVEC cell-line rows.

supporting_quote: Cultured A431 cells ... RNA was isolated from the cells and K-Ras mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human primer probe set RTS3496_MGB ... was used to measure mRNA levels. K-Ras mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of K-Ras, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis-style patent. Predominant in-vitro normalization in A431 (RTS3496_MGB) and Hep3B/HepG2 (RTS132/RTS246) is total RNA by RiboGreen (22+ 'adjusted according to total RNA' blocks). EXCEPTION: a minority of A431 dose-response blocks state 'K-Ras mRNA levels were normalized to beta-actin mRNA levels' (and one block 'normalized to beta-actin mRNA levels or RIBOGREEN'), so beta-actin (ACTB) is used in some in-vitro A431 experiments -> used_actb=yes. In-vivo tumor-tissue and 3D-colony assays use GAPDH/18S/beta-actin, but those are not the assigned cell-line rows. Hep3B blocks specifically use RiboGreen/total RNA.

supporting_quote: Cultured SH-SY5Y cells ... were treated using electroporation ... SCN2A RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. Human SCN2A primer-probe set RTS36041 ... was used to measure RNA levels. SCN2A RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). [other SH-SY5Y blocks:] SCN2A RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by GAPDH. Levels of GAPDH were measured using human primer probe set RTS104 ...
notes: MIXED in-vitro normalizer within the SAME SH-SY5Y cell line. SCN2A measured by SCN2A primer-probe RTS36041; results as % control. Across the SH-SY5Y experiment blocks the normalization basis is split ~50/50: 4 blocks normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN, and 4 blocks normalized to GAPDH (housekeeping gene, primer-probe RTS104). (A third scheme, 'normalized to mouse GAPDH RNA', applies only to in-vivo transgenic-mouse data, not SH-SY5Y.) Chose total_RNA_ribogreen as the primary basis since RiboGreen blocks tie GAPDH blocks; this is a genuine GAPDH-housekeeping exception flagged for downstream awareness.

supporting_quote: Cultured iCell(R) cardiomyocytes 2 ... were treated by electroporation ... total RNA was isolated from the cells, and PLN RNA levels were measured ... PLN RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Reduction of PLN RNA is presented in the tables below as percent PLN RNA, relative to untreated control cells (% UTC).
notes: Ionis-style patent. All iCell cardiomyocytes 2 (FujiFilm Cellular Dynamics R1017) in-vitro tables (% UTC; primer-probe RTS40402) are normalized to total RNA by RiboGreen, under both electroporation and free-uptake. EXCEPTION is NOT in iCell: the in-vivo transgenic-mouse heart tables (TaqMan Hs00160179_m1) are 'normalized to GAPDH' (and some 'normalized to Ribogreen'), but those are mouse-tissue rows, not the assigned iCell cardiomyocyte cell line. Despite the PLN/cardiomyocyte free-uptake caveat, the verified basis for the cell-line data is RiboGreen/total RNA.

supporting_quote: Cultured Hep3B cells ... were transfected using electroporation ... Human primer probe set hSCNN1A_LTS01170 ... was used to measure mRNA levels. alpha-ENaC mRNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the tables below as normalized alpha-ENaC mRNA level, relative to untreated control cells (these conditions describe a 'Standard Cell Assay').
notes: Ionis-style patent; target SCNN1A = alpha-ENaC. The assigned Hep3B in-vitro 'Standard Cell Assay' data (primer-probe hSCNN1A_LTS01170) is normalized to total RNA by RiboGreen. EXCEPTION is NOT in Hep3B: a single ALI (air-liquid-interface) primary-airway transwell experiment (PneumaCult-ALI medium, 6 weeks post seeding, basolateral free uptake) states 'alpha-ENaC mRNA levels were normalized to cyclophilin A' (primer-probe HTS3936) -- a differentiated-cell free-uptake block, not the Hep3B screen rows.
